name: Social Media Management
tagline: Consistent, on-brand content — handled entirely by us.
description: Monthly content calendars, platform graphics, captions, and scheduling — fully managed under your agency's name. Your client stays active and on-brand without you spending an hour on it.

deliverables.title: Monthly Content Calendar
deliverables.description: A full month of planned posts — topics, formats, and posting schedule — delivered for your approval before anything goes live.

deliverables.title: Graphic Design
deliverables.description: On-brand static and carousel graphics for each platform. Sized correctly, visually consistent, client-approved.

deliverables.title: Caption Writing
deliverables.description: Platform-native captions written in the client's voice — hooks, body, hashtags, and CTAs included.

deliverables.title: Scheduling & Publishing
deliverables.description: Posts scheduled at optimal times for reach and engagement. We handle the publishing — your client just shows up.

deliverables.title: Platform Management
deliverables.description: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and TikTok. We manage whichever platforms your client needs.

deliverables.title: Monthly Performance Report
deliverables.description: Reach, engagement, follower growth, and top-performing content — white-labelled and ready to forward.

whyUs.title: Completely hands-off for you
whyUs.description: You approve the calendar once a month. We do everything else — design, write, schedule, and report. Your bandwidth stays free.

whyUs.title: Retainer stability for predictable revenue
whyUs.description: Social is a natural retainer service — every client needs it every month. It's a reliable income stream that grows your MRR without adding complexity.

whyUs.title: Platform-native execution
whyUs.description: We don't repost the same content everywhere. Each platform gets content built for its format, audience, and algorithm.

faq.question: Which platforms do you manage?
faq.answer: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and TikTok. We'll recommend the right mix for your client's business and audience during the discovery call.

faq.question: How does the approval process work?
faq.answer: We deliver a full monthly content calendar — posts, graphics, captions — for your review each month. You approve, request changes, or pass it straight to your client for sign-off. Nothing goes live without approval.

faq.question: Do you engage with comments and DMs?
faq.answer: Community management (responding to comments and DMs) is available as an add-on. By default, this retainer covers content creation and scheduling only.

faq.question: What do you need from us to get started?
faq.answer: Brand assets (logo, colours, fonts), existing content samples or tone notes, and platform access. The onboarding call covers all of this in under 30 minutes.
